message: agentq duplicate now rejects --of pointing to the same finding, and doctor reports duplicate findings that self-reference, omit duplicate_of, or point to unknown IDs. Added workflow tests for command rejection and doctor invariant. Validation: dotnet test tools/AgentQueue/tests/AgentQueue.Tests/AgentQueue.Tests.csproj; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1.

Verified duplicate self-reference rejection in QueueMutationCommands, duplicate reference invariants in QueueDoctor, and targeted workflow tests. Validation passed: dotnet test tools/AgentQueue/tests/AgentQueue.Tests/AgentQueue.Tests.csproj (7 passed); .\scripts\agentq.ps1 doctor (doctor ok).
